text:
本批词根亮点：

• -gate 大家族：fumigate/irrigate/mitigate/castigate/instigate/subjugate/promulgate/abrogate/arrogate/expurgate，全来自拉丁 agere（驱使/做）+前缀，gate=驱使

• excruciate：ex（加强）+ crux（十字架），像被钉在十字架上=极度痛苦，crucify（钉十字架）/crucial（关键=十字路口）同根

• propitiate：来自 propitius（有利的），古罗马通过祭祀平息众神，propitious（吉祥）同根

• vitiate：vitium（缺陷/罪），vitiate=引入缺陷=损害，vice（恶习）同根

• emaciate：e+macer（瘦），极度消瘦，macrobiotic（长寿=细长的生命）同根

• decimate：deci（十分之一），古罗马军法中对叛乱士兵每十人杀一人，decimation=杀十分之一，decimal（小数）同根

• oscillate：来自拉丁 oscillum（秋千），秋千摆动=振荡，oscillator 振荡器

• sublimate：sub（在下）+ limate（升起），物质从固态直接升为气态=升华，心理学引申为将欲望升华为创造力

quiz.question: profligate ________
quiz.explanation: 挥霍的，挥霍的开支。The government's profligate spending led to a severe budget deficit. 政府的挥霍开支导致了严重的预算赤字。 | pro->向前，flig->打击（拉丁fligere），profligate->被打倒的=堕落的/挥霍的（cf. afflict折磨，conflict冲突，inflict施加，profligacy挥霍）

quiz.question: fumigate _____
quiz.explanation: 熏蒸消毒，熏蒸消毒房屋。They had to fumigate the house after discovering termites. 发现白蚁后他们不得不对房屋进行熏蒸消毒。 | fum->烟（拉丁fumus），gate->驱使，fumigate->用烟驱除虫害（cf. fume烟/愤怒，fumigation熏蒸，perfume香水=通过烟，fumarole火山气孔）

quiz.question: irrigate ______
quiz.explanation: 灌溉，灌溉田地。Farmers must irrigate fields regularly during the dry season. 农民必须在旱季定期灌溉田地。 | ir->进入，rig->水流（拉丁rigare->浇水），irrigate->引水进入=灌溉（cf. irrigation灌溉，arid干旱，riga拉脱维亚首都=水边的城市）

quiz.question: mitigate ____
quiz.explanation: 减轻，减轻风险。The company implemented new safety protocols to mitigate risk. 公司实施了新的安全规程以减轻风险。 | mit->温和（拉丁mitis->温和），gate->使，mitigate->使温和=减轻（cf. mild温和，mitigate缓和，unmitigated没有减轻的，mitigation缓解）

quiz.question: castigate __________
quiz.explanation: 严厉批评，严厉批评腐败。The editorial continued to castigate corruption among high-ranking officials. 这篇社论继续严厉批评高级官员中的腐败。 | caste->纯洁（拉丁castus），gate->使，castigate->使变纯洁=惩戒（cf. chaste纯洁，chastise惩戒，chastity贞洁，castigate严厉批评）

quiz.question: instigate ________
quiz.explanation: 煽动，煽动暴力。Authorities arrested the agitator for attempting to instigate violence. 当局逮捕了试图煽动暴力的煽动者。 | in->进入，stig->刺（拉丁instigare->刺激），instigate->刺激使行动=煽动（cf. stigma烙印，instigation煽动，agitate鼓动，provoke激怒）

quiz.question: promulgate ___
quiz.explanation: 颁布，颁布法律。The legislature voted to promulgate law protecting workers' rights. 立法机构投票颁布保护工人权利的法律。 | pro->向前，mulg->公告（拉丁mulgare->公开），promulgate->向公众宣告=颁布（cf. promulgation颁布，publish发布，proclaim宣布，proclamation宣告）

quiz.question: abrogate _ ______
quiz.explanation: 废除，废除条约。The new administration threatened to abrogate a treaty that had been in place for decades. 新政府威胁要废除已实施数十年的条约。 | ab->离开，rog->要求（拉丁rogare），abrogate->撤回要求=废除（cf. arrogate僭取，derogate贬损，prerogative特权，interrogate审讯）

quiz.question: derogate ____
quiz.explanation: 贬损，贬损。Such behavior would derogate from the dignity of the office. 这种行为会贬损该职位的尊严。 | de->向下，rog->要求（拉丁），derogate->向下要求=贬低（cf. abrogate废除，arrogate僭取，interrogate审讯，derogatory贬义的）

quiz.question: arrogate _____
quiz.explanation: 僭取，僭取权力。The dictator continued to arrogate power that rightfully belonged to the parliament. 独裁者继续僭取本应属于议会的权力。 | ar->朝向，rog->要求，arrogate->要求本不属于自己的=僭取（cf. arrogant傲慢=僭取过多，prerogative特权，abrogate废除，arrogance傲慢）

quiz.question: expurgate _ ____
quiz.explanation: 删除，删除书中不当内容。The publisher decided to expurgate a book before releasing it to younger readers. 出版商决定在向年轻读者发行前删除书中不当内容。 | ex->向外，purg->净化（拉丁purgare），expurgate->净化向外=删除不当内容（cf. purge清除，purify净化，pure纯，expurgation删节）

quiz.question: subjugate _ ______
quiz.explanation: 征服，征服一个民族。The empire's attempt to subjugate a people led to decades of resistance. 帝国试图征服一个民族导致了数十年的抵抗。 | sub->在下，jug->轭（拉丁jugum），subjugate->置于轭下=征服（cf. conjugal婚姻=共同的轭，jugular颈静脉，yoga瑜伽=结合，yoke轭）

quiz.question: corrugate _________
quiz.explanation: 使起皱，瓦楞纸板。The factory workers corrugate cardboard to create stronger packaging material. 工厂工人制作瓦楞纸板以生产更坚固的包装材料。 | cor->共同，rug->皱纹（拉丁ruga），corrugate->使出现皱纹=使起皱（cf. corrugated iron瓦楞铁，ruga皱纹，corrugation波纹状）

quiz.question: emaciate ___ ____
quiz.explanation: 使消瘦，使身体消瘦。Prolonged illness can emaciate the body severely. 长期疾病会严重使身体消瘦。 | e->向外，maci->瘦（拉丁macies），emaciate->使极度消瘦（cf. macrobiotic长寿=细长生命，lean瘦，gaunt消瘦，emaciated骨瘦如柴）

quiz.question: depreciate ______
quiz.explanation: 贬值，资产贬值。Companies must depreciate assets over time according to accounting standards. 公司必须根据会计准则使资产随时间贬值。 | de->向下，preci->价值（拉丁pretium），depreciate->使价值向下=贬值（cf. appreciate升值，precious珍贵，price价格，appraise评估）

quiz.question: enunciate _______
quiz.explanation: 清晰发音，清晰地发音。The speech therapist taught the child to enunciate clearly. 语言治疗师教孩子清晰地发音。 | e->向外，nunci->宣告（拉丁nuntiare），enunciate->向外宣告=清晰发音（cf. announce宣布，pronounce发音，renounce放弃，denunciate谴责）

quiz.question: denunciate __________
quiz.explanation: 谴责，谴责腐败。Activists gathered to denunciate corruption in the government. 活动人士聚集谴责政府的腐败。 | de->向下，nunci->宣告，denunciate->向下宣告=公开谴责（cf. denounce谴责，announce宣布，renounce放弃，enunciate发音）

quiz.question: renunciate _______ _______
quiz.explanation: 放弃，放弃世俗欲望。The monk chose to renunciate worldly desires. 这位僧侣选择放弃世俗欲望。 | re->回，nunci->宣告，renunciate->宣告回归=正式放弃（cf. renounce放弃，denounce谴责，announce宣布，pronunciation发音）

quiz.question: associate _________
quiz.explanation: 副的，副教授。Dr. Smith was promoted to associate professor after publishing her research. 史密斯博士在发表研究成果后晋升为副教授。 | as->朝向，soci->伙伴（拉丁socius），associate->与伙伴联系=同事/副（cf. society社会，social社交，socialize社交，dissociate分离）

quiz.question: dissociate _______
quiz.explanation: 分离，使自己分离。The politician tried to dissociate oneself from the controversial remarks. 政客试图使自己与有争议的言论分离。 | dis->分开，soci->伙伴，dissociate->分开伙伴关系=分离（cf. associate联系，dissociation分离，society社会，cf. dissociative解离性）

quiz.question: excruciate __ ____
quiz.explanation: 使痛苦，因痛苦而折磨。The injury continued to excruciate by pain throughout the night. 这个伤口整夜都因痛苦折磨着他。 | ex->加强，crux->十字架（拉丁），excruciate->像被钉上十字架一样=极度折磨（cf. crucify钉十字架，crucial关键=十字路口，cross十字，excruciating剧烈的）

quiz.question: irradiate ____
quiz.explanation: 照射，照射食物。Scientists irradiate food to extend its shelf life. 科学家照射食物以延长保质期。 | ir->向内，radi->光线（拉丁radius），irradiate->向内照射（cf. radiation辐射，radiate发射，ray光线，eradiate发出光芒）

quiz.question: mediate ________
quiz.explanation: 调解，调解冲突。The diplomat was called in to mediate conflict between the two nations. 外交官被召来调解两国冲突。 | medi->中间（拉丁medius），mediate->在中间=调解（cf. median中位数，media媒体，medieval中世纪=中间时代，immediate立即=无中间）

quiz.question: repudiate _____
quiz.explanation: 否认，否认声明。The company moved quickly to repudiate claim made by its former employee. 公司迅速否认前雇员的声明。 | re->回，pud->羞耻（拉丁pudor），repudiate->将其视为羞耻而拒绝=否认（cf. impudent无耻，pudency羞耻，repudiation否认）

quiz.question: retaliate __ ____
quiz.explanation: 报复，以同样方式报复。When attacked, the nation chose to retaliate in kind. 受到攻击时，该国选择以同样方式报复。 | re->回，tali->以眼还眼（拉丁talis->同等的），retaliate->以同等方式回应=报复（cf. talion同态复仇，retaliation报复，revenge报复）

quiz.question: ciliate ________
quiz.explanation: 有纤毛的，有纤毛的原生动物。Under the microscope, we observed ciliate protozoa moving through the water sample. 在显微镜下我们观察到有纤毛的原生动物在水样中移动。 | cili->睫毛（拉丁cilium），ciliate->有纤毛的（cf. cilium纤毛，ciliary睫状体，supercilious傲慢=眉毛高扬，eyelash睫毛）

quiz.question: conciliate _________
quiz.explanation: 安抚，安抚对手。The leader's strategy was to conciliate opponents rather than confront them. 领导者的策略是安抚对手而不是直接对抗。 | con->共同，cili->议会（拉丁concilium），conciliate->召开议会和解=安抚（cf. council议会，reconcile和解，irreconcilable不可调和，conciliation安抚）

quiz.question: affiliate _______
quiz.explanation: 附属，附属项目。The university launched an affiliate program with several international institutions. 该大学与国际机构启动了附属项目。 | af->朝向，fili->儿子（拉丁filius），affiliate->收为儿子=使附属（cf. filial孝顺，filicide杀子，filiation血统，affiliate联盟成员）

quiz.question: palliate ________
quiz.explanation: 缓解，缓解症状。The medication can only palliate symptoms but not cure the disease. 这种药物只能缓解症状但不能治愈疾病。 | palli->披风（拉丁pallium），palliate->用披风覆盖=掩盖/缓解（cf. palliative缓解性的，pallor苍白，cloak掩盖，palliative care姑息治疗）

quiz.question: defoliate ___ _____
quiz.explanation: 使落叶，使树木落叶。The chemical agent was designed to defoliate the trees in enemy territory. 这种化学制剂旨在使敌方领土上的树木落叶。 | de->去除，foli->叶子（拉丁folium），defoliate->使叶子脱落（cf. foliage叶子，folio对折纸，portfolio作品集，defoliation落叶）

quiz.question: calumniate _ _____
quiz.explanation: 诽谤，诽谤对手。It is unethical to calumniate a rival in order to gain political advantage. 为了政治优势而诽谤对手是不道德的。 | calumni->诽谤（拉丁calumnia），calumniate->故意诽谤（cf. calumny诽谤，calumnious诽谤性的，slander诽谤，defame损毁名誉）

quiz.question: opiate ________
quiz.explanation: 鸦片类药物，鸦片类药物过量。Emergency rooms have seen a dramatic increase in opiate overdose cases. 急诊室看到鸦片类药物过量病例急剧增加。 | opium->鸦片（希腊opos->汁液），opiate->鸦片制剂（cf. opium鸦片，opioid类鸦片，overdose过量，morphine吗啡=Morpheus睡眠之神）

quiz.question: expiate _____
quiz.explanation: 赎罪，赎罪。He spent years trying to expiate guilt over his past mistakes. 他花了多年时间为过去的错误赎罪。 | ex->向外，pi->虔诚（拉丁pius），expiate->通过虔诚行为清除罪孽=赎罪（cf. piety虔诚，pious虔诚，impious不虔诚，expiation赎罪）

quiz.question: inebriate ______
quiz.explanation: 醉酒的，醉酒的司机。Police arrested an inebriate driver after a routine traffic stop. 警方在例行交通检查后逮捕了醉酒的司机。 | in->使，ebri->醉（拉丁ebrius->醉），inebriate->使醉=醉酒的（cf. inebriated醉酒，sobriety清醒，sober清醒，temperance节制）

quiz.question: excoriate ___ ______
quiz.explanation: 严厉批评，严厉批评政策。Opposition leaders continued to excoriate the policy as harmful to workers. 反对派领导人继续严厉批评该政策对工人有害。 | ex->去除，cori->皮肤（拉丁corium），excoriate->剥皮=严厉批评（cf. corium真皮，coroner验尸官，leather皮革，excoriate痛斥）

quiz.question: appropriate _____
quiz.explanation: 拨款，拨款。Congress voted to appropriate funds for disaster relief. 国会投票为救灾拨款。 | ap->朝向，propr->自己的（拉丁proprius），appropriate->使成为自己的=占用/拨款（cf. proper适当，property财产，propriety礼仪，expropriate征用）

quiz.question: expropriate ____
quiz.explanation: 征用，征用土地。The government moved to expropriate land for the new highway project. 政府采取行动为新高速公路项目征用土地。 | ex->向外，propr->自己的，expropriate->使不再是自己的=征用（cf. appropriate占用，property财产，proper合适，propriety礼仪）

quiz.question: repatriate ________
quiz.explanation: 遣返，遣返难民。International agencies worked to repatriate refugees to their home countries. 国际机构努力将难民遣返回本国。 | re->回，patri->父亲/祖国（拉丁pater），repatriate->送回祖国=遣返（cf. patriarch族长，paternal父亲的，patrician贵族，expatriate外籍人）

quiz.question: expatriate ______
quiz.explanation: 外籍的，外籍工人。The company hired an expatriate worker with extensive international experience. 公司雇用了一名具有丰富国际经验的外籍工人。 | ex->离开，patri->祖国，expatriate->离开祖国的人=外籍人（cf. repatriate遣返，patriot爱国者，paternal父亲的，compatible兼容）

quiz.question: striate ______
quiz.explanation: 有条纹的，横纹肌。The anatomy textbook showed detailed diagrams of striate muscle tissue. 解剖学教科书展示了横纹肌组织的详细图表。 | stri->条纹（拉丁stria->沟槽），striate->有条纹的（cf. striated striped有条纹，stripe条纹，striation条纹，stria沟槽）

quiz.question: infuriate ___ _____
quiz.explanation: 激怒，激怒人群。The speaker's insensitive remarks served only to infuriate the crowd. 演讲者不敏感的言论只会激怒人群。 | in->使，furi->愤怒（拉丁furia），infuriate->使愤怒=激怒（cf. fury愤怒，furious愤怒，furor公众愤怒，fusillade连续射击）

quiz.question: expatiate __
quiz.explanation: 详述，详述。The professor began to expatiate on the complexities of quantum mechanics. 教授开始详述量子力学的复杂性。 | ex->向外，pati->漫步（拉丁spatiari），expatiate->向外漫步=详细阐述（cf. spacious宽敞，space空间，spatial空间的，expatiate详述）

quiz.question: initiate _ _______
quiz.explanation: 启动，启动项目。The committee voted unanimously to initiate a project focused on renewable energy. 委员会一致投票启动一个专注于可再生能源的项目。 | init->开始（拉丁initium->起点），initiate->进入开始=启动（cf. initial最初，initiative主动，initiation入会，initial letter首字母）

quiz.question: propitiate ____
quiz.explanation: 抚慰，抚慰神灵。Ancient civilizations performed rituals to propitiate gods and ensure good harvests. 古代文明举行仪式抚慰神灵以确保丰收。 | propiti->有利（拉丁propitius），propitiate->使有利于自己=平息（cf. propitious吉祥，propitiatory安抚的，favorable有利，auspicious吉祥）

quiz.question: vitiate ________
quiz.explanation: 损害，损害合同。The lawyer argued that fraud would vitiate contract and render it invalid. 律师辩称欺诈会损害合同使其无效。 | vitium->缺陷/罪（拉丁），vitiate->引入缺陷=损害（cf. vice恶习，vicious恶毒，vitiated受损的，virtuous有美德=无缺陷）

quiz.question: substantiate _____
quiz.explanation: 证实，证实声明。The researcher provided extensive evidence to substantiate claim. 研究人员提供了大量证据来证实该声明。 | sub->在下，stanti->站立（拉丁），substantiate->站得住脚=证实（cf. substance实质，substantial实质性的，substitute替代，constant恒定）

quiz.question: differentiate ________
quiz.explanation: 区分，区分特征。It can be difficult to differentiate features between the two similar species. 很难区分两个相似物种之间的特征。 | differ->不同，entiate->使，differentiate->使不同=区分（cf. differ不同，different不同，indifferent漠然，differential差分）

quiz.question: potentiate ___ ______
quiz.explanation: 增强，增强效果。Certain drugs can potentiate the effect of alcohol in the bloodstream. 某些药物可以增强血液中酒精的效果。 | potent->有力（拉丁potens），iate->使，potentiate->增强效力（cf. potential潜力，potent有力，impotent无力，omnipotent全能）

quiz.question: obviate ___ ____
quiz.explanation: 消除，消除需要。The new software will obviate the need for manual data entry. 新软件将消除手动输入数据的需要。 | ob->对抗，vi->道路（拉丁via），obviate->挡在路上=消除障碍（cf. obvious明显=在路上，devious弯路=偏离，previous之前，via经由）

quiz.question: deviate ____ ____
quiz.explanation: 偏离，偏离道路。The pilot was forced to deviate from path due to severe weather. 由于恶劣天气飞行员被迫偏离航路。 | de->离开，vi->道路（拉丁via），deviate->离开道路=偏离（cf. devious迂回，obvious明显，previous之前，via经由，deviation偏差）

quiz.question: alleviate ____
quiz.explanation: 减轻，减轻疼痛。The doctor prescribed medication to alleviate pain after surgery. 医生开了药以减轻手术后的疼痛。 | al->使，levi->轻（拉丁levis），alleviate->使变轻=减轻（cf. levitate悬浮=变轻，lever杠杆，relief减轻，levity轻浮）

quiz.question: asphyxiate ______
quiz.explanation: 使窒息，使受害者窒息。Toxic fumes threatened to asphyxiate victim trapped inside. 有毒烟雾威胁要使困在里面的受害者窒息。 | a->无，sphyx->脉搏（希腊sphyzein->脉搏），asphyxiate->无脉=窒息（cf. asphyxia窒息，suffocate使窒息，choke窒息，stifle压制）

quiz.question: relate _____
quiz.explanation: 讲述，讲述故事。The elderly woman began to relate story of her childhood during the war. 老妇人开始讲述她战争期间的童年故事。 | re->回，lat->携带（拉丁latus），relate->携带回来=讲述/联系（cf. relation关系，relative亲戚，relative相对，narrate叙述）

quiz.question: inflate ___ _______
quiz.explanation: 夸大，夸大数字。The report attempted to inflate the numbers to make results appear more impressive. 报告试图夸大数字使结果看起来更令人印象深刻。 | in->进入，flat->吹（拉丁flare），inflate->吹进去=充气/夸大（cf. deflate泄气，flat平的，conflate混淆，flatulence胀气）

quiz.question: conflate _____
quiz.explanation: 混淆，混淆观点。It is a common mistake to conflate ideas that are actually quite distinct. 将截然不同的观点混淆是常见错误。 | con->共同，flat->吹（拉丁），conflate->吹合在一起=混淆（cf. inflate夸大，deflate泄气，flatulent充满气的，conflation合并混淆）

quiz.question: invigilate __ ____
quiz.explanation: 监考，监考考试。The teacher was assigned to invigilate an exam for the final-year students. 老师被指派监考期末学生的考试。 | in->使，vigil->清醒（拉丁vigil），invigilate->保持清醒看守=监考（cf. vigil守夜，vigilant警惕，vigilance警惕，invigorate振奋）

quiz.question: assimilate __________
quiz.explanation: 同化，同化移民。The program was designed to help assimilate immigrants into mainstream society. 该项目旨在帮助移民同化进入主流社会。 | as->朝向，simil->相似（拉丁similis），assimilate->使相似=同化（cf. similar相似，simulate模拟，dissimilar不同，simile明喻）

quiz.question: ventilate ____
quiz.explanation: 通风，给房间通风。Open the windows to ventilate room and remove stale air. 打开窗户给房间通风并排出污浊空气。 | vent->风（拉丁ventus），ilate->使，ventilate->使有风=通风（cf. wind风，vent出口，ventilation通风，event事件=风来了）

quiz.question: flagellate ____
quiz.explanation: 有鞭毛的，鞭毛细胞。The biology student examined flagellate cell under high magnification. 生物学学生在高倍放大镜下检查鞭毛细胞。 | flagell->鞭子（拉丁flagellum），flagellate->有鞭子的=有鞭毛的（cf. flagellum鞭毛，flagellate鞭打，self-flagellation自我惩罚）

quiz.question: vacillate _______
quiz.explanation: 犹豫，在两者间犹豫。She continued to vacillate between accepting the job offer and staying at her current position. 她继续在接受工作机会和留在现职位之间犹豫。 | vacill->摇摆（拉丁vacillare），vacillate->摇摆=犹豫不决（cf. waver动摇，hesitate犹豫，oscillate振荡，ambivalent矛盾心理）

quiz.question: oscillate ______
quiz.explanation: 振荡，剧烈振荡。Stock prices began to oscillate wildly in response to market uncertainty. 股票价格开始剧烈振荡以应对市场的不确定性。 | oscill->秋千（拉丁oscillum），oscillate->像秋千一样摆动=振荡（cf. oscillator振荡器，vacillate犹豫，fluctuate波动，undulate波动）

quiz.question: percolate ______
quiz.explanation: 渗透，煮咖啡。The aroma filled the kitchen as the machine began to percolate coffee. 机器开始煮咖啡时香气充满了厨房。 | per->穿透，col->过滤（拉丁colare），percolate->穿透过滤=渗透/煮（cf. filter过滤，percolation渗透，seep渗，trickle细流）

quiz.question: immolate _______
quiz.explanation: 焚烧，自焚。The protester threatened to immolate oneself in front of the government building. 抗议者威胁要在政府大楼前自焚。 | im->在上，mol->磨（拉丁mola->磨石/祭品），immolate->在祭石上奉献=牺牲/焚烧（cf. mole摩尔，molecule分子，immolation献祭）

quiz.question: extrapolate _____
quiz.explanation: 推断，推断趋势。Economists attempted to extrapolate trend from the limited data available. 经济学家试图从有限数据中推断趋势。 | extra->超出，pol->柱（拉丁polire->磨光），extrapolate->超出已知点推延=推断（cf. interpolate插值，extrapolation外推，interpolation内插）

quiz.question: interpolate ____
quiz.explanation: 插入，插值数据。The software can interpolate data to fill in missing values. 该软件可以插值数据以填补缺失值。 | inter->之间，pol->磨光，interpolate->在两点之间插入=内插（cf. extrapolate外推，interpose插入，interpolation内插法）

quiz.question: desolate _________
quiz.explanation: 荒凉的，荒凉的景观。The travelers crossed a desolate landscape with no signs of human habitation. 旅行者穿越了荒凉的景观没有人类居住的迹象。 | de->彻底，sol->单独（拉丁solus），desolate->彻底单独=荒凉的（cf. solitude孤独，sole唯一，solo独奏，console安慰=不再孤独）

quiz.question: insolate _______
quiz.explanation: 日晒，晒样品。Researchers needed to insolate samples for several hours to complete the experiment. 研究人员需要晒样品几个小时以完成实验。 | in->使，sol->太阳（拉丁sol），insolate->使暴露在太阳下=日晒（cf. solar太阳的，solstice至点，parasol遮阳伞，insolation日照）

quiz.question: slate _ _________
quiz.explanation: 提名，提名候选人。The party committee decided to slate a candidate for the upcoming election. 党委会决定为即将到来的选举提名候选人。 | slate->石板（古法语esclate），slate->用石板列名=提名（cf. slate清单/石板，clean slate重新开始，slate grey青灰色）

quiz.question: legislate ______
quiz.explanation: 立法，立法改革。Parliament moved quickly to legislate reform in the healthcare system. 议会迅速对医疗保健系统进行立法改革。 | leg->法律（拉丁lex），islate->使，legislate->制定法律=立法（cf. legislature立法机关，legal合法，legislation法规，illegitimate非法）

quiz.question: perambulate _______
quiz.explanation: 巡视，巡视街道。The security guard would perambulate streets throughout the night. 保安会在整个夜晚巡视街道。 | per->穿过，ambul->走（拉丁ambulare），perambulate->穿过走动=巡视（cf. ambulance救护车=走动的，ambulatory门诊的，amble漫步）

quiz.question: discombobulate _____
quiz.explanation: 使混乱，使计划混乱。The unexpected announcement served to discombobulate plans for the merger. 出乎意料的公告使合并计划变得混乱。 | discombobulate->幽默词（可能来自 discompose+disconcert），使完全混乱（cf. disconcert使困惑，discombobulate搞乱，bamboozle欺骗）

quiz.question: maculate ______
quiz.explanation: 玷污，玷污记录。The scandal threatened to maculate record of an otherwise distinguished career. 丑闻威胁要玷污杰出职业生涯的记录。 | macul->斑点（拉丁macula），maculate->使有斑点=玷污（cf. immaculate无瑕=无斑点，immaculate conception无染原罪，macular黄斑的）

quiz.question: peculate _____
quiz.explanation: 挪用，挪用资金。The treasurer was accused of attempting to peculate funds from the organization. 财务主管被指控试图挪用该组织的资金。 | pecul->私人财产（拉丁pecunia->金钱），peculate->侵占他人财产=挪用（cf. peculiar特别=属于个人的，pecuniary金钱的，peculium私有财产）

quiz.question: speculate __ ______
quiz.explanation: 投机，炒股。Many investors lost money when they chose to speculate on stocks during the market bubble. 许多投资者在市场泡沫期间炒股而亏损。 | spec->观察（拉丁specere），speculate->观察可能性=推测/投机（cf. spectacle景象，inspect检查，respect尊重，spectacular壮观）

quiz.question: matriculate __
quiz.explanation: 入学，入学于。She was excited to matriculate at her first-choice university. 她很兴奋能入学于首选大学。 | matric->母亲（拉丁mater），matriculate->进入母亲的怀抱=入学（cf. matrix矩阵=子宫，maternal母亲的，matricide弑母，matron老妇人）

quiz.question: articulate _______
quiz.explanation: 善于表达的，善于表达的演讲者。The articulate speaker captivated the audience with her clear arguments. 这位善于表达的演讲者以清晰论点吸引了观众。 | artic->关节（拉丁articulus），articulate->用关节连接=清晰表达（cf. article文章/冠词，joint关节，articulation发音/关节）

quiz.question: inoculate ________
quiz.explanation: 接种，给儿童接种。The health department launched a campaign to inoculate children against measles. 卫生部门发起了给儿童接种麻疹疫苗的运动。 | in->进入，ocul->眼/芽（拉丁oculus），inoculate->将芽植入=接种（cf. ocular眼部的，oculist眼科医生，eye眼，oculus圆眼窗）

quiz.question: circulate _ ____
quiz.explanation: 传阅，传阅备忘录。The manager asked her assistant to circulate a memo about the new policy. 经理要求助理传阅关于新政策的备忘录。 | circ->圆（拉丁circus），circulate->绕圈传递=传阅（cf. circle圆，circuit回路，circumference周长，circus马戏团=圆形场地）

quiz.question: emasculate ___ ____
quiz.explanation: 削弱，削弱法案。Amendments threatened to emasculate the bill and remove its most important provisions. 修正案威胁要削弱法案并删除最重要的条款。 | e->去除，mascul->男性（拉丁masculus），emasculate->去除男性力量=削弱（cf. masculine男性，mascot吉祥物，male男性，castrate阉割）

quiz.question: adulate _ _________
quiz.explanation: 阿谀奉承，阿谀奉承名人。Fans gathered to adulate a celebrity they had admired for years. 粉丝聚集阿谀奉承他们崇拜多年的名人。 | adul->讨好（拉丁adulari->像狗一样摇尾），adulate->过分奉承（cf. adulation奉承，flattery谄媚，sycophant马屁精，adulatory奉承的）

quiz.question: modulate ___ ____
quiz.explanation: 调节，调节音调。Professional singers learn to modulate the tone of their voice for different effects. 专业歌手学习调节音调产生不同效果。 | modul->尺度（拉丁modus），modulate->按尺度调整=调节（cf. module模块，model模型，mode模式，modify修改，mood情绪）

quiz.question: coagulate _____
quiz.explanation: 凝结，凝结血液。Certain proteins help coagulate blood and stop bleeding from wounds. 某些蛋白质帮助凝结血液并止住伤口出血。 | co->共同，agul->凝固（拉丁coagulare），coagulate->共同凝固=凝结（cf. coagulation凝固，congeal凝固，clot血凝块，curdle凝固）

quiz.question: regulate ___________
quiz.explanation: 调节，调节温度。The thermostat works automatically to regulate temperature throughout the building. 恒温器自动工作以调节整个建筑物的温度。 | reg->统治（拉丁regere），regulate->按规则统治=调节（cf. regular规则，reign统治，regal皇家，regiment管制，deregulate解除管制）

quiz.question: pullulate ____ ____
quiz.explanation: 充满，充满生机。The coral reef seemed to pullulate with life in every crevice. 珊瑚礁的每个缝隙都似乎充满生机。 | pullul->发芽（拉丁pullulare->发芽），pullulate->大量繁殖=充满（cf. proliferate增生，teem充满，swarm群集，abound充满）

quiz.question: emulate _ _____
quiz.explanation: 效仿，效仿榜样。Young athletes often try to emulate a model they consider successful. 年轻运动员经常试图效仿他们认为成功的榜样。 | aemul->竞争（拉丁aemulus->竞争者），emulate->与...竞争=效仿（cf. emulation效仿，rival竞争对手，simulate模拟，mimic模仿）

quiz.question: dissimulate ________
quiz.explanation: 掩饰，掩饰感情。She learned to dissimulate feelings to maintain her professional demeanor. 她学会了掩饰感情以保持职业风度。 | dis->否定，simul->相似（拉丁），dissimulate->使看起来不同=掩饰（cf. simulate模拟，dissemble掩饰，feign假装，pretend假装）

quiz.question: accumulate ______
quiz.explanation: 积累，积累财富。Through careful investing and saving, they managed to accumulate wealth over the years. 通过谨慎投资和储蓄他们多年来成功积累了财富。 | ac->朝向，cumul->堆（拉丁cumulus），accumulate->向堆叠=积累（cf. cumulus积云，cumulate堆积，accumulation积累，reservoir储备）

quiz.question: stipulate _____
quiz.explanation: 规定，规定条款。The contract clearly stipulate terms for payment and delivery. 合同明确规定了付款和交付的条款。 | stipul->茎/条件（拉丁stipulari->议定），stipulate->正式议定=规定（cf. stipulation规定，condition条件，proviso附带条件，clause条款）

quiz.question: insulate _____
quiz.explanation: 绝缘，使电线绝缘。Electricians must properly insulate wires to prevent electrical hazards. 电工必须正确使电线绝缘以防止电气危险。 | insul->岛（拉丁insula），insulate->使像岛一样隔离=绝缘（cf. island岛，insular岛国的/孤立的，isolate隔离，peninsula半岛）

quiz.question: encapsulate ___ ____
quiz.explanation: 概括，概括想法。The phrase seemed to perfectly encapsulate the idea he had been trying to express. 这个短语似乎完美地概括了他试图表达的想法。 | en->使，capsul->小容器（拉丁capsula），encapsulate->放入小容器=概括（cf. capsule胶囊，capture捕获，chapter章节，captain队长）

quiz.question: capitulate __ _____
quiz.explanation: 投降，向武力投降。The besieged city was forced to capitulate to force after months of resistance. 被围困的城市在抵抗数月后被迫向武力投降。 | capit->头（拉丁caput），capitulate->低头=投降（cf. capital首都=头，captain队长=头，decapitate斩首，recapitulate再概括）

quiz.question: recapitulate ______
quiz.explanation: 概括，概括要点。At the end of the lecture, the professor took time to recapitulate points for clarity. 讲座结束时教授花时间概括要点以求清晰。 | re->再次，capit->头，recapitulate->再次从头整理=概括（cf. capitulate投降，capital首都，captain队长，chapter章节=小头）

quiz.question: postulate ______
quiz.explanation: 假定，假定理论。Scientists must postulate theory before conducting experiments to test it. 科学家必须在进行实验测试之前假定理论。 | postul->要求（拉丁postulare），postulate->要求接受=假定（cf. postulation假定，posit假设，axiom公理，hypothesis假设）

quiz.question: expostulate ____
quiz.explanation: 劝诫，劝诫。The teacher tried to expostulate with the student about his poor attendance. 老师试图就学生的出勤率不佳对他进行劝诫。 | ex->向外，postul->要求，expostulate->向外提出要求=劝诫（cf. postulate假定，remonstrate劝告，admonish告诫，exhort劝告）

quiz.question: amalgamate _____
quiz.explanation: 合并，合并公司。The two competing companies decided to amalgamate firms to increase market share. 两家竞争公司决定合并以增加市场份额。 | amalgam->汞合金（希腊，可能来自Arabic amalgam->联合），amalgamate->合并（cf. amalgam合金，merge合并，consolidate巩固，fuse融合）

quiz.question: __________ stalemate
quiz.explanation: 僵局，外交僵局。Negotiations reached a diplomatic stalemate with neither side willing to compromise. 谈判陷入外交僵局双方都不愿妥协。 | stale->僵停的位置（国际象棋术语），mate->将军，stalemate->不能移动的将军=僵局（cf. check将军，checkmate将死，impasse僵局）

quiz.question: decimate ___ _____
quiz.explanation: 大量毁灭，大量消灭队伍。The plague threatened to decimate the ranks of the army. 瘟疫威胁要大量消灭军队的队伍。 | decim->十分之一（拉丁decem->十），decimate->杀十分之一（古罗马军法中对叛乱部队每十人杀一人，cf. decimal小数，decade十年，December十二月）

quiz.question: sublimate ______
quiz.explanation: 升华，升华欲望。The artist learned to sublimate desire into creative expression. 这位艺术家学会了将欲望升华为创造性表达。 | sub->在下，lim->门槛（拉丁limen），sublimate->越过门槛=升华（cf. sublime崇高=越过门槛，subliminal潜意识=在门槛以下，limit限制）

quiz.question: acclimate _______
quiz.explanation: 适应，快速适应。New employees were expected to acclimate quickly to the fast-paced work environment. 新员工被期望快速适应快节奏的工作环境。 | ac->朝向，climat->气候（希腊klima->倾斜），acclimate->适应气候=适应（cf. climate气候，acclimatize适应，adapt适应，climatology气候学）

quiz.question: inanimate ______
quiz.explanation: 无生命的，无生命的物体。The child's imagination brought the inanimate object to life in her story. 孩子的想象力在故事中赋予了无生命的物体生命。 | in->否定，anim->生命（拉丁anima），inanimate->无生命的（cf. animate有生命的，animal动物，animosity敌意，animated活跃的，anime动画）
